suggestion.summary: Browser blocked external resource request to replit-dev-banner.js due to ORB (Origin Resource Blocking) policy
suggestion.reason: This is a browser-level network security block, not an application code error. Cannot be fixed by modifying application code.
suggestion.suggestedFix: This error occurs when the browser blocks cross-origin requests for security reasons. It's likely related to Replit's development environment banner script. Consider: 1) Check if this script is necessary for production, 2) If needed, ensure proper CORS headers are set on the Replit resource, 3) This may resolve automatically in production deployment outside Replit's development environment.
